attributes.action: change the idea of the uk social media ban
attributes.additional_details: I believe that the social media ban in the uk is not right we should find other ways to protect under 16s banning it will effect childrens mental health and will stop them from keeping up with news. This will also stop them from talking to the friend and making online friends this social media ban will effect children education aswell this could also lead to more suicide as the children will be bored and have nothing to do wich could lead to mental health problems.
attributes.background: change the idea of the uk social media ban to something like screen time for certain age categories or apps to not be accessible for certain ages for example snap chat 14+ anyone under 14 will not be able to access the app

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: 

Government ban on social media to be for under 13s only
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757849
